name: Monte Tamaro paragliding tandem flight
description: Discover Monte Tamaro paragliding tandem flight in Switzerland.
longDescription: Discover Monte Tamaro paragliding tandem flight in Switzerland.

subcategory.title: Paragliding
subcategory.description: Book your next paragliding trip in Switzerland here. During a tandem flight you can admire incredible landscapes from a bird's eye view. Hotspots for paragliding are Interlaken, Central Switzerland and the Engadine. But also in Valais there are some breathtaking launch sites. After a few quick steps you are in the air and can enjoy the surroundings while your tandem pilot ensures a safe flight.

providers.name: SwissActivities
providers.description: Switzerland's largest activities marketplace — book securely online

gallery.alternativeText: Paragliding: experience the tandem flight over Monte Tamaro with a spectacular panorama and dreamy view.
Paragliding: Tandem flight over Monte Tamaro with a view of the picturesque landscape and mountains.
Paragliding: Tandem flight over Monte Tamaro in sunny autumn, wonderful views of the mountains.
Paragliding Monte Tamaro: Tandem flight over the mountains with spectacular views of nature and landscape.
